input.content: Against Ceremonial Beast, its 'Plow' power indicates the HP threshold (typically 150) that triggers a Stun. Reaching this HP threshold cancels its current attack and resets its Strength. Always calculate if your hand can push its HP below the Plow threshold; if so, play all attacks to break it instead of blocking.
